titleStmt.title: SII 10.341: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 341. (A.R. No. 219 of 1905.) ON THE SAME WALL. Ś. 1175. (Pramādi)

summary.p: States that a certain Dāmōdarappayya gave 50 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśubhaśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1175 nagu nēṁṭi pramādisaṁvatsara kā¨rttikaśuddha 15 gu
nāṁḍu mahākā¨rttikanimittamugānu śrītripurāṁtaka śrīmanmahādēvaraku svasti samasta praśastisahita
mu śrīmanmahāpradhāni yaina moṭṭapalli bhāskaradēvani bāvayuṁ gauṁḍinyānvayamū ¨rddhasyuṁḍunu
sakalavēdētihāsapurāṇādhyayanādhyāpanacaturuṁḍunuṁ baramamāhēśvaruṁḍunu śrī tripu
rāṁttakadēvadivyaśrīpādaparmārādhakuṁḍunu śrīmanmahāpradhāniyu naina dāmōdara ppayya Akhaṁḍa
dīpamuna kiccina modavulu 50 vīniṁ jēkoni bammala prōliseṭṭikoḍku Eṟṟayaseṭṭi tana vaṁśaparaṁ
para nityamāneṁḍu neyi Ācaṁdrā¨rkaṁbugā naḍapaṁgalavāṁḍu maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrī
tikkayavrālu vīrayavrālu muṭṭiṁpa niccina kaṁcudivvekaṁbālu reṁḍu .
Digital edition of SII 10.341 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
